Interdisciplinary Groups

Revolutionizing Healthcare Communication

At Teral, we transform healthcare communication using AI and collaboration to improve patient care and address medical challenges.

The AI Copilot for doctors

Benefit from 24/7 support from Teral AI, our AI assistant, for medical questions and insights. Enjoy AI-driven case management and anonymization for secure and efficient handling of patient data

Get the App Now

Total Security and Privacy for Healthcare Professionals 

Fully compliant with HIPAA and GDPR standards to ensure your data is protected at every level.

Your personal data remains confidential, with no commercial ads disrupting your experience.

Open to all medical specialties, ensuring a dedicated and professional environment for healthcare experts only.

Get the App Now

Enhanced Case Collaboration and Management

Seamlessly chat with colleagues and share clinical cases in real-time. Post and discuss cases in both private and public groups, and track progress with detailed comments and follow-ups.

Utilize our extensive case repository to support diagnoses and treatment decisions, ensuring you have access to a wealth of knowledge and insights.

Get the App Now

What Our Users Are Saying

Organize your medical cases with Teral. Share, manage, and discuss cases effortlessly in a secure and user-friendly app.

"It's been really helpful for working with a multidisciplinary team."

By sharing cases in this application in a more summarized way, other specialists can comment and give their opinions, helping us solve issues more effectively.

Diana Carolina Gómez

Ophthalmologist

“A great app for organizing my cases, teaching, and case discussions.”

The application has become an essential tool for my daily practice, allowing seamless collaboration with colleagues and improving patient outcomes.

David Caicedo

Orthopedist

Enhance Patient Care with Teral in Your Hospital

Book a demo and discover how Teral can enhance collaboration, streamline interconsultations, and ensure faster, more accurate patient care in your hospital.
